positive: A detailed, centered, high-contrast illustration featuring a whimsical arrangement of stylized bioluminescent forest elements. The main subjects include glowing mushrooms, abstract ferns, and subtle woodland creature silhouettes (deer, fox). The style must be a perfect blend of Art Nouveau engraving and modern clean vector illustration. Utilize strong, flowing black linework defining the shapes, overlaid onto a subtle gradient background of deep indigo and forest emerald. The overall mood is magical and ethereal. Lighting must be dramatic, emanating from the subjects to give a natural, glowing effect. Composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, optimized for a single, impactful print on apparel. Isolated composition, clean edges, high detail, vector graphic quality.
negative: blurry, noisy, watermark, logo, text, signature, poorly drawn, ugly, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, grayscale, overexposed, low resolution
